Module Description: Fixed Google Ads Manager account not fetching. Rewrote the listAccessibleCustomers API call to use the gRPC google-ads-api library to bypass proxy 404 errors.
Remarks: Google Ads accounts now correctly appear in the UI dropdown.

Module Description: Refactored publishGoogleCampaign to use the new gRPC google-ads-api. Replaced REST endpoints for Budgets, Campaigns, and AdGroups to fix 404 errors.
Remarks: Successfully creates a Draft (PAUSED) Campaign with Budget and AdGroup in the user's real Google Ads account.

Module Description: Added real LinkedIn publishing instead of mock database entries. Wired the dashboard 'Publish' action to hit a new /linkedin/publish endpoint.
Remarks: Publishes the AI generated ad caption as a real Organic Post to the connected LinkedIn feed.

Module Description: Fixed Meta Ad publishing by mapping user performance goals to Meta's strict objective enum rules.
